charlatan v0.4.1.92
  • Get started
  • Reference
  • Articles
    • Contributing to charlatan
  • Changelog

Create fake credit card data

Source: R/credit_card.R
ch_credit.Rd

Create fake credit card data

ch_credit_card_provider(n = 1)

ch_credit_card_number(n = 1)

ch_credit_card_security_code(n = 1)

Arguments

n

(integer) number of things to get, any non-negative integer

See also

CreditCardProvider

Examples

ch_credit_card_provider()

#> [1] "VISA 13 digit"
ch_credit_card_provider(n = 4)

#> [1] "Diners Club / Carte Blanche" "Voyager"                    
#> [3] "Voyager"                     "VISA 16 digit"              

ch_credit_card_number()

#> [1] "3029920914187430"
ch_credit_card_number(n = 10)

#>  [1] "55821598456759745"   "3158858753341885512" "630427474181867"    
#>  [4] "210053563370194873"  "676169284876518"     "180076491244311833" 
#>  [7] "3112708944846777674" "676237531150763"     "3046304788424356"   
#> [10] "6011683567865808028"
ch_credit_card_number(n = 500)

#>   [1] "6011547043439943796" "3434440869918761"    "3058373905190206"   
#>   [4] "3088660273502725694" "6011542025701412803" "869942352493120088" 
#>   [7] "639057917328668"     "4349593612139"       "4153739347282103"   
#>  [10] "52766082163890173"   "3158931830601518529" "869990282963468827" 
#>  [13] "4472425140276849"    "51084918534846326"   "3005281208292715"   
#>  [16] "869919505860540308"  "502079012666487"     "3049193433265729"   
#>  [19] "6011209890097031655" "6011521304346778265" "4488567317257789"   
#>  [22] "869999440043859834"  "6011472330903879385" "4607345328985"      
#>  [25] "4460757473858866"    "4696640570104747"    "4514227658639602"   
#>  [28] "3784328022619260"    "52535106035573848"   "180039366351208533" 
#>  [31] "52297224741056020"   "4933782524043721"    "3494955322134257"   
#>  [34] "589333587277642"     "869994527299687037"  "4285443747232344"   
#>  [37] "869987730914961782"  "3045808326530582"    "6011183408322518451"
#>  [40] "869951169676409957"  "4751361568897497"    "3754366584868590"   
#>  [43] "3096270051583077876" "52003184577763138"   "4933435928140813"   
#>  [46] "4357301826451867"    "3052448991964353"    "4235517322060898"   
#>  [49] "3053485111695599"    "869925636021454535"  "4094901814049"      
#>  [52] "4918982158963900"    "561285623940302"     "4334551795753"      
#>  [55] "3528353406316804642" "53121942804807813"   "3158649824184160497"
#>  [58] "4764369930053"       "060456214081855"     "4352671412473045"   
#>  [61] "6011699463158383717" "869927481253278155"  "502096133811941"    
#>  [64] "4187777954993505"    "4590333268068"       "869931276349534247" 
#>  [67] "3736765965734292"    "3088050163569501385" "6011115630043404520"
#>  [70] "676365156047055"     "4813606677884"       "3112459203424976518"
#>  [73] "3022311240608348"    "3158326354189774985" "3023874155412229"   
#>  [76] "869941249467962266"  "4589012239648"       "3337336368788590681"
#>  [79] "53453309463934577"   "3088927302894906635" "4731933830432"      
#>  [82] "561270808167277"     "4424122431226075"    "180011390762944439" 
#>  [85] "4638346305680"       "4752435669409730"    "55791516443974009"  
#>  [88] "6011807953990719416" "3000416506306446"    "4482214012504332"   
#>  [91] "3528283840821817001" "3491771656172315"    "4083582365181"      
#>  [94] "4288809472948"       "503800056251945"     "180023911351832994" 
#>  [97] "589396985963055"     "3337351629821371805" "4898546890262055"   
#> [100] "4328826120939684"    "4468150052933"       "3779675828234976"

#> [139] "4661227817681306"    "3049391944383300"    "210051082962272130" 
#> [142] "4616853744129"       "4622192698740498"    "676216991875994"

#> [499] "3006268579786424"    "180099585325170456" 

ch_credit_card_security_code()

#> [1] "900"
ch_credit_card_security_code(n = 10)

#>  [1] "1319" "3699" "405"  "269"  "167"  "072"  "820"  "703"  "767"  "536" 
ch_credit_card_security_code(n = 500)

#>   [1] "489"  "008"  "857"  "193"  "277"  "400"  "099"  "239"  "487"  "577" 
#>  [11] "457"  "986"  "929"  "719"  "905"  "826"  "495"  "277"  "714"  "753"
